calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Brown appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Selam Gezahegn for Lawrence Jackson III.

Mr. Gezahegn stated that the basis for his objection is that there is no asset to probate, that there was a joint tenancy between Pearl and Adolph, and that there was no revocation of the joint tenancy. Mr. Brown stated that the opposing parties are trying to prevent his Client from having any standing, that the Court had no authority to issue adverse possession and that they are trying to prevent his Client from having a claim against Lawrence. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
